product_overview: A web-based system to manage student clearance workflows across university departments, providing role-based authentication, student profile management, department approvals and final certificate issuance. The backend exposes REST APIs for authentication, student management and clearance orchestration, with email/notification integrations.
core_goals: Provide secure, JWT-based multi-role authentication for Admin, Department Staff and Students.
Enable students to submit and track clearance requests and allow department staff to review and update request status.
Give admins and departments visibility into clearance requests and statistics, and allow issuance of final certificates.
Support password recovery and secure password change flows, with email-based reset delivery.
Ensure API-level authorization and clear error responses for unhappy paths.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Handles staff/admin and student login, password reset and change, and retrieval of the current authenticated user's profile.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid staff credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with valid staff credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with staff user profile
POST /api/auth/student/login with valid student credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with student profile
POST /api/auth/change-password with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid currentPassword and newPassword -> Receive 200 password changed confirmation
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 confirmation that reset token/email was sent
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 confirmation -> POST /api/auth/reset-password with reset token and new password -> Receive 200 password reset successful
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message
GET /api/auth/me without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error

features.name: Student Management API
features.description: CRUD and profile operations for student accounts: listing students (admin), reading and updating the logged-in student's profile, and student-specific dashboard endpoints.
user_flows: GET /api/students with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with paginated list of students
GET /api/students with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> (student role) -> Receive 403 Forbidden when listing all students
GET /api/students/profile with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> -> Receive 200 with the student's profile data
PUT /api/students/profile with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> and valid profile update body -> Receive 200 with updated profile
POST /api/admin/students/bulk-import with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> and valid CSV payload -> Receive 201 import accepted (or 200 with import summary)
GET /api/students without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error
PUT /api/students/profile with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> and invalid payload (validation fails) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: Clearance Process API
features.description: Create and manage clearance requests, route sub-requests to departments, allow department staff to approve/reject with remarks, and enable admins to issue final certificates and view clearance statistics.
user_flows: POST /api/students/clearance-request with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> and valid request body -> Receive 201 with requestId and initial request summary
POST /api/students/clearance-request without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error
GET /api/clearance/requests with Authorization: Bearer <admin_or_dept_token> -> Receive 200 with list of clearance requests (filtered by role/department)
GET /api/clearance/requests/:id with Authorization: Bearer <dept_or_admin_token> -> Receive 200 with full clearance request details including departmentStatuses
PUT /api/departments/requests/:id/status with Authorization: Bearer <dept_token> and body { status: 'approved', remarks: '...' } -> Receive 200 with updated department status
PUT /api/departments/requests/:id/status with Authorization: Bearer <dept_token> and invalid request id -> Receive 404 Not Found
PUT /api/departments/requests/:id/status with Authorization: Bearer <student_token> (student attempting dept action) -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/clearance/requests/:id/issue-certificate with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with certificate object or download link when all departments cleared

POST /api/clearance/requests/:id/issue-certificate with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> when not all departments cleared -> Receive 400 Bad Request with reason (e.g., 'pending department approvals')
GET /api/clearance/statistics with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with clearance processing metrics and departmental statistics

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User and student authentication, password management, and logout.

features.name: Student Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for student profiles and management.

features.name: Clearance Process API
features.description: Managing clearance requests and departmental approvals.
